description: Nooks is an AI dialer and virtual sales floor that automates research, dialing, and coaching to give reps more live conversations and faster ramp.
tagline: AI dialer and virtual sales floor
overview: Nooks automates prospect research, dialing, and call coaching, pairing an AI dialer with a virtual sales floor so reps hold more live conversations and ramp faster.
what_is: Nooks is an AI sales platform focused on the phone. It automates research, dialing, call logging, and note-taking, and adds coaching, so reps spend their time in live conversations instead of busywork.

It is strongest for inside-sales and outbound teams that want to lift connect rates and pipeline speed. Its virtual sales floor and AI assistants help teams generate more calls and ramp new reps quickly, often with results in days.

Nooks integrates with CRMs, data providers, and email systems to build lists and automate calling. It is not a full CRM or email-marketing platform; it concentrates on improving the phone sales process with AI.
